message:
feat(database,io,raptorq): extend cancellation to mysql driver and refine copy checkpoint

MySQL connection: add Cx cancellation checks to poll_write and poll_read
loops in MySqlConnection so that long-running query I/O respects scope
cancellation, matching the pattern established across the net subsystem.

io::copy: upgrade cancellation check from `is_cancel_requested()` to
`checkpoint().is_err()` across all three copy variants (basic, vectored,
and zero-copy splice) for consistency with the checkpoint-based pattern
used everywhere else.

tests/e2e_raptorq_pipeline: add deterministic exact-budget decode helper
and extend end-to-end pipeline coverage with budget-constrained symbol
selection scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
